name: TableauPipeline
description: This Test Connection validates the access against the Tableau server and basic metadata extraction of Prep Flows.

steps.name: GetPipelines
steps.description: List all the Tableau Prep flows available to the user
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch pipelines, please validate the credentials or validate if user has access to fetch Tableau Prep flows

steps.name: GetLineage
steps.description: Query the Tableau Metadata API to verify lineage extraction will work
steps.errorMessage: Failed to reach the Tableau Metadata API. Lineage extraction requires the Metadata API to be enabled: https://help.tableau.com/current/api/metadata_api/en-us/docs/meta_api_start.html
